name: Real Estate Agent Finder with ScrapeOps and Google Sheets

parameters.content:
# 🏘️ Real Estate Agent Finder → Google Sheets + Alerts

This workflow automates finding real estate agents in any city by scraping Google Maps. It performs a deep scrape to extract agent name, phone, website, rating, reviews, and address — cross-references results with Google Sheets to remove duplicates — then saves fresh leads and sends alerts via Gmail and Slack.

### How it works
1. 📝 **Form: Enter City to Search** captures the target city from a simple web form.
2. ⚙️ **Set Google Maps Configuration** sets the search keyword and location parameters.
3. 🌐 **ScrapeOps: Search Google Maps** scrapes Google Maps for real estate agents via [ScrapeOps Proxy](https://scrapeops.io/docs/n8n/proxy-api/).
4. 🔍 **Parse Business Listings** extracts name, address, rating, and Maps URL from results.
5. 📡 **ScrapeOps: Fetch Business Details** deep-scrapes each listing for phone, website, reviews, and more.
6. 🗺️ **Parse Full Business Info** normalizes all fields into a clean structured record.
7. 📂 **Read Previous Entries from Sheet** loads existing leads to check for duplicates.
8. 🧹 **Compare & Deduplicate Leads** filters out agents already saved in the sheet.
9. 🔀 **Filter New Leads Only** keeps only fresh, unseen results.
10. 💾 **Save New Leads to Sheet** appends new leads to Google Sheets.
11. 📧 **Send Gmail Alert** notifies you of new leads by email.
12. 📣 **Send Slack Alert** posts a summary to your Slack channel.

### Setup steps
- Register for a free ScrapeOps API key: https://scrapeops.io/app/register/n8n
- Add ScrapeOps credentials in n8n. Docs: https://scrapeops.io/docs/n8n/overview/
- Duplicate the [Google Sheet template](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1C7OAR6d6bngkrCw-On7zoIYY0QjobLVdDaP_d7u-hKU/edit?gid=0#gid=0) and connect it to the Sheet nodes.
- Configure Gmail and Slack credentials for the alert nodes.
- Open the form URL, enter a city, and run.

### Customization
- Change the `keyword` in **Set Google Maps Configuration** to find property managers, mortgage brokers, home inspectors, etc.
- Replace the Form Trigger with a Schedule Trigger to run automatically on a recurring schedule.

## 1. Input & Configuration
Capture the target city via form and set the Google Maps search keyword and parameters.

## 4. Save & Alert
Append new agent leads to Google Sheets and send notifications via Gmail and Slack.

## 2. Deep Scrape Google Maps
Search Maps for real estate agents via [ScrapeOps Proxy](https://scrapeops.io/docs/n8n/proxy-api/), then deep-scrape each listing for phone, website, reviews, and address.

## 3. Deduplicate Leads
Load existing sheet entries, compare against new results, and keep only agents not previously saved.

parameters.subject: ={{ '📍 New Businesses Found in ' + $('Set Google Maps Configuration').first().json.city + ' (Real Estate Agent)' }}
